business_ideas.idea: Mercury: neo-bank for startups offering better rates and FDIC insurance than traditional banks
Cursor: AI-powered IDE for coding that simplifies development for engineers and non-coders alike

predictions.text: Winners in every category take lion's share of rewards; winners need strong brand moat and regulatory moat
Neo-banks can grow with startups and retain customers rather than losing them as they scale
AI-assisted coding tools will become standard infrastructure; productivity multipliers still improving
